news.summary: In the first fiscal quarter of 2025, 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals, Inc. reported a 55% increase in net product revenues, reaching $163.6 thousand, while gross profit surged by 124% to $90.3 thousand. Operating expenses rose to approximately $2.09 million, notably due to increased spending in sales and investor-related services, and stock-based compensation. The net loss attributable to common shareholders amounted to approximately $2.01 million, compared to a net income of $308.7 thousand in the same quarter of 2024. 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a pharmaceutical company focused on developing new medicines for infectious diseases.
news.headline: 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals reported Q1 2025 results: Net product revenues up 55% to $163.6 thousand, gross profit up 124% to $90.3 thousand. Includes increased operating expenses leading to a net loss of $2.01 million in Q1 2025.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. The latest data reveals that approximately 250,000 new jobs were created in the last month alone, with the majority of them in the technology and healthcare sectors. This decrease in unemployment has been largely attributed to the government’s initiatives to boost job creation and support small businesses. Economists are optimistic about the future outlook, believing that this trend will continue in the coming months. Additionally, it was noted that the average hourly wage increased by 3.5% compared to the previous year, indicating positive growth in the labor market. This decline in unemployment and rise in wages are seen as positive signals for the overall economic recovery of the country.
news.headline: Beam Global reports Q1 2025 financial performance.

news.summary: Irving, Texas - On May 15, 2025, Commercial Metals Company (NYSE: CMC) revealed the completion of a sale worth $150.0 million in original aggregate principal amount of Solid Waste Disposal Facilities Revenue Bonds. This move was formally announced by CMC.
news.headline: Commercial Metals Company closes $150M tax-exempt bond financing for Solid Waste Disposal Facilities.

news.summary: A well-known space strategy game, Galactic Civilizations IV, is undergoing a significant update in key aspects such as galaxy creation, fleet organization, and artificial intelligence. The revamp, announced in Plymouth, Michigan on May 15, 2025, includes improvements to core gameplay mechanics and map generation.
news.headline: Galactic Civilizations IV v3.0 update announced, revamping core game mechanics, with franchise sale on Steam.

news.summary: In Lakeland, Florida, on May 15, 2025, Florida Southern College announced the introduction of its inaugural group of students at the School of Architecture on the historic Frank Lloyd Wright campus. The school is scheduled to commence operations in fall 2025, symbolizing a noteworthy milestone for the institution.
news.headline: Florida Southern College to welcome first architecture student cohort in Fall 2025 on Frank Lloyd Wright campus.

news.summary: In Farmington, Connecticut, Horizon Technology Finance Corporation (NASDAQ: HRZN) revealed its succession planning strategy. Horizon, an affiliate of Monroe Capital, offers secured loans to technology, life science, healthcare information, and sustainability industries. As a top specialty finance provider, Horizon assists venture capital, private equity-backed, and publicly traded companies. This announcement marks a significant step for the Company as it plans for the future of leadership.
news.headline: Horizon Technology Finance appoints Michael P. Balkin as CEO, an affiliate of Monroe Capital, providing secured loans to various industries.

news.summary: MasterControl, a prominent provider of quality, manufacturing, and asset management software solutions, has introduced a new AI-powered feature to aid regulated manufacturers in simplifying the process of creating electronic batch records. The company declared the beta release of Master Template on May 15, 2025 in Berlin. This innovative feature aims to enhance efficiency and streamline operations for manufacturers by utilizing artificial intelligence technology.
news.headline: MasterControl releases Master Template Generator Beta to help streamline electronic batch record creation for regulated manufacturers.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, MDU Resources Group, Inc. disclosed that Darrel T. Anderson has been appointed as the new independent chair of the board, taking over from Dennis W. Johnson. The shift is effective immediately, with Johnson retaining his position on the board. MDU Resources Group, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol MDU.
news.headline: MDU Resources Group appoints Darrel T. Anderson as new Board Chair, succeeding Dennis W. Johnson.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Neuberger Berman Municipal Fund Inc. declared a distribution of $0.05417 per common stock share (NYSE American: NBH). This distribution will be paid on June 16, 2025, with a record date of May 30, 2025.
news.headline: Neuberger Berman Municipal Fund declares $0.05417/share monthly distribution on May 15, 2025 for payment on June 16, 2025.

news.summary: Since June 2023, Jie "Jay" Yu has showcased exceptional skills in public company accounting and currently holds the position of Vice President of Finance at Ispire. In a strategic move in May 2025, Ispire managed to enhance its operations by reducing approximately $3.6 million in annual payroll expenses.
news.headline: Jay Yu appointed CFO of Ispire Technology Inc. in June 2023, cutting $3.6 million in annual payroll in May 2025.

news.summary: A new real estate development, Santa Rosa Estates, is set to introduce 18 high-end residences on expansive two to three-acre lots within a gated community located in Ventura County.
news.headline: Toll Brothers to launch Santa Rosa Estates: a luxury community in Santa Rosa Valley, California with 18 homes on 2-3 acre lots.

news.summary: Endo, Inc. based in Malvern, Pennsylvania, made a significant announcement on May 15, 2025, stating that their product ADRENALIN® is the first FDA-approved and sole manufacturer-prepared epinephrine premixed intravenous (IV) bag commercially available. The company's stock symbol is OTCQX: NDOI. This development marks a milestone in the medical field as it addresses the need for readily available, pre-prepared epinephrine solutions in healthcare settings. This initiative provides immediate access to critical care solutions and enhances treatment efficiency.
news.headline: Endo Inc. introduces new concentration of ADRENALIN® ready-to-use premixed bags, the only FDA-approved IV epinephrine bag.

news.summary: Seattle-based Jones Soda Co. (CSE: JSDA) (OTCQB: JSDA) revealed its financial performance for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company reported revenue of $4.6 million for this quarter, showcasing a comparison with the same period last year.
news.headline: Jones Soda reported Q1 2025 revenue of $4.6 million, a comparison to the year-ago quarter.

news.summary: A base shelf prospectus is now available for public access, and a prospectus supplement will be accessible within the next two business days on the SEDAR+ platform. Stay updated on the upcoming release to ensure timely access to the prospectus supplement.

news.summary: A company based in Westford, Massachusetts, Kadant Inc. (NYSE: KAI), revealed on May 15, 2025, that its Board of Directors gave the green light for a quarterly cash dividend to stockholders. The approved amount is $0.34 per share, scheduled to be disbursed on August 7, 2025, for stockholders noted as of July 10, 2025. It was mentioned that subsequent dividend declarations will require Board consent and could be altered based on business requirements or market circumstances.
news.headline: Kadant Inc. (NYSE: KAI) declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.34 per share on May 15, 2025, to be paid on August 7, 2025.

news.summary: A significant achievement has been reached in establishing a self-sufficient critical minerals and materials (CMM) supply chain that is not dependent on China. This milestone represents a crucial step towards ensuring independence in sourcing essential minerals and materials. The development of this integrated and operational supply chain marks a key advancement in bolstering national security and economic stability. This achievement underscores the importance of reducing reliance on a single source for critical resources.
news.headline: WTMA and EM announce SEC registration statement's effectiveness for strategic business combination, aiming for an independent CMM supply chain.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Fluent, Inc. (NASDAQ: FLNT), a company specializing in commerce media solutions, released its unaudited financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Fluent (NASDAQ: FLNT) reports Q1 2025 financial results, highlighting growth in commerce media solutions.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Pittsburgh-based MSA Safety Incorporated (NYSE: MSA), the leading developer of cutting-edge safety products and solutions safeguarding individuals and facility infrastructures worldwide, disclosed its involvement in upcoming investor conferences.
news.headline: MSA Safety (NYSE: MSA) to feature in investor conferences; leading in safety products.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) officials are scheduled to engage with investors at multiple conferences during May and June 2025. Those interested can access a copy of Con Edison's investor presentation for these conferences on the Presentations & Webcasts page. Con Edison is listed on the NYSE under ED.
news.headline: Con Edison executives to attend financial conferences in May and June 2025, sharing investor presentation.

news.summary: Today, Kadant Inc. (NYSE: KAI) from Westford, Mass., announced a plan for stock repurchase of up to $50 million. This plan is effective from May 15, 2025, to May 15, 2026. The repurchases can occur through public or private transactions, including under Securities Exchange Act Rule 10b-5-1 trading plans. The specifics of repurchase, such as timing and amounts, will be decided by the company's management considering market conditions and other factors, including constraints outlined in their credit agreement made on March 1, 2017, and later restated. As of now, no shares have been bought back under the $50 million authorization that is set to end on May 16, 2025.
news.headline: Kadant Inc. authorizes share repurchase of up to $50 million from May 15, 2025 through May 15, 2026. No shares repurchased yet.

news.summary: BIO-key, a company listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol BKYI, has disclosed its Q1’25 financial results. The revenue for the quarter stood at $1.6 million, indicating a positive financial performance. Additionally, the company noted an enhanced cash position of $3.1 million, showcasing financial stability and potential for investment and growth. Tomorrow, on Friday, May 16th at 10am Eastern Time, BIO-key will be hosting an investor call, providing an opportunity for stakeholders to gain insights into the recent financial developments and future prospects of the company.
news.headline: BIO-key's Q1’25 revenue: $1.6M, cash position: $3.1M. Investor call on May 16th at 10am ET.

news.summary: Today, in Torrance, California, Emmaus Life Sciences, Inc. disclosed its financial standing for the three months ending on May 15, 2025. As a renowned leader in sickle cell disease treatment, the commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company, listed as OTCQB: EMMA, presented its operational results.
news.headline: Emmaus Life Sciences (OTCQB: EMMA) reports financial results for Q1 2025, highlighting performance in treatment of sickle cell disease.

news.summary: Following the assignment of favorable Medicare payment rates, there has been a notable increase in the adoption of CompuFlo®. This growth is reflected in a significant rise in numbers, with adoption rates reaching [specific number], showcasing the positive response to the new payment rates. Furthermore, the company has decided to expand its federal outreach efforts after being awarded a Federal Supply Schedule (FSS) contract. This expansion aims to reach a broader audience in the federal sector and drive further adoption of CompuFlo®. The outreach plan includes reaching out to [specific number] federal agencies and institutions to promote the benefits of the product.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on May 15, 2025, Hapbee Technologies, Inc. (TSXV: HAPB | OTCQB: HAPBF), a notable provider of wearable wellness technology, has partnered with Liberty Alliance, a veteran-owned business (SDVOSB) known for defense innovation and mission support. This venture is geared towards bringing Hapbee's unique ultra-low frequency wearable devices to military personnel, special operations forces, and veteran communities globally.
news.headline: Hapbee Technologies partners with Liberty Alliance to provide wearable technology to the defense sector; TSXV: HAPB | OTCQB: HAPBF.

news.summary: In Oakland, California on May 15, 2025, The Clorox Company (NYSE: CLX) revealed the participation of Chair and CEO Linda Rendle along with CFO Luc Bellet in a fireside chat at the dbAccess Global Consumer Conference on June 4.
news.headline: Clorox executives to present at dbAccess conference on June 4. CEO Linda Rendle & CFO Luc Bellet to speak.

SCYNEXIS is a leading biotechnology firm focused on developing groundbreaking medications to combat challenging-to-treat and drug-resistant infections.
news.headline: SCYNEXIS reports Q1 2025 financial results; pioneering innovative medicines for difficult-to-treat infections.

(referred to as "Metalla" or the "Company") has reported its stock trading symbol on both the Toronto Venture Exchange (TSXV: MTA) and the New York Stock Exchange American (NYSE American: MTA). The company deals in thousands of US dollars for all monetary values unless specified otherwise, with the exceptions of shares, per ounce, and per share amounts.

news.summary: Lifezone Metals Limited (NYSE: LZM) disclosed shareholder voting outcomes during its 2025 Annual General Meeting in Douglas, Isle of Man. Shareholders resoundingly approved all ordinary resolutions presented. In particular, for the receipt of the Company's accounts for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, 99.98% of votes, representing 57,260,294 shares, were in favor while the remaining abstained.
news.headline: Lifezone Metals had its 2025 AGM results: Over 57 million shareholders voted on receiving accounts with a 99.98% in favor.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Globus Medical, Inc., a prominent company specializing in musculoskeletal solutions, revealed plans for a significant financial move. The company's Board of Directors approved a share repurchase program for up to $500 million of the company's common stock. This initiative aims to enhance shareholder value and indicate confidence in the company's future performance and financial standing.
news.headline: Globus Medical authorizes $500 million share repurchase program for its outstanding common stock.

(NYSE: WH) revealed that their Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.41 per share for their common stock. This dividend will be distributed on June 30, 2025, to shareholders listed on the record as of June 13, 2025. Wyndham Hotels & Resorts is known for...
news.headline: Wyndham Hotels & Resorts declares $0.41 quarterly dividend per share, payable on June 30, 2025 to shareholders on record by June 13, 2025.

news.headline: Treasure Global Inc. turns $5.0 million net loss in Q3 2024 to modest net profit in Q3 2025.

news.summary: In San Diego, Nuvve Holding Corp. (Nasdaq: NVVE) reported a first quarter 2025 update, noting a 19.8% rise in total revenue to $0.9 million. Nuvve is a green energy tech company offering a commercial vehicle-to-grid (V2G) platform for electric vehicles. This technology allows EV batteries to store and resell surplus energy to the local grid, along with providing other grid services.
news.headline: Nuvve reports Q1 2025 update with total revenue up by 19.8% to $0.9 million. EV grid technology platform growing.

news.summary: A significant lead order of $3 million has been secured from strategic investors to bolster a bold transformation initiative. This funding injection will be pivotal in driving forward the company's innovative changes and growth strategies. The substantial investment signifies a strong vote of confidence in the company's vision and future prospects. Such financial backing is instrumental in fueling the development and implementation of key initiatives that will pave the way for future success.
news.headline: Rakovina Therapeutics secures $3 million through private placement and convertible debt to drive US growth and oncology innovation.

news.summary: Today, on May 15, 2025, OGE Energy Corp. (NYSE: OGE) conducted its 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders through virtual means. During the meeting, the board of directors was elected, and decisions were made on various agenda items. The meeting commenced with Chairman, President, and CEO Sean Trauschke expressing gratitude to the company's stakeholders for their support.
news.headline: OGE Energy Corp holds virtual annual meeting, elects board of directors in 2025. CEO Sean Trauschke expresses gratitude.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Windsurf revealed the release of SWE-1, its initial set of proprietary AI models to enhance the software development process. This launch signifies the company's venture into pioneering model creation, offering three models tailored for diverse workflows and user levels. These models aim to expedite software engineering processes beyond code generation. Windsurf's SWE-1 family competes with established models for software-centric tasks, achieving a high level of performance.
news.headline: Windsurf introduces SWE-1 AI models for software engineering lifecycle. Includes 3 models for different workflows, aimed to accelerate software development.

news.summary: Braze, a top customer engagement platform traded on NASDAQ under the symbol BRZE, disclosed the upcoming release of its financial performance for the initial quarter of fiscal year 2026, concluding on April 30, 2025. The announcement is scheduled after the closure of U.S. financial markets on Thursday, June 5, 2025. Following this, a webcast conference call is set to take place at 4:30 pm ET (1:30 pm PT) on the same day for a detailed discussion of the results. The webcast can be accessed through the events section on their platform.
news.headline: Braze (NASDAQ: BRZE) to report Q1 financial results for FY 2026 on June 5, 2025, after US markets close. Webcast at 4:30 pm ET.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Doximity, Inc. (NYSE: DOCS), a prominent digital platform for U.S. medical professionals, divulged its fiscal 2025 fourth quarter and full-year results concluding on March 31, 2025. Doximity's Co-founder and CEO, Jeff Tangney, stated, “We ended fiscal 2025 on a positive note, witnessing record engagement, robust profits, and a notable 20% annual revenue growth." Significant accomplishments in Q4 included peak performances in the newsfeed, workflow, and AI tools, empowering doctors to enhance efficiency and deliver optimal care.
news.headline: Doximity (NYSE: DOCS) reported strong fiscal 2025 performance with 20% annual revenue growth and record engagement. CEO Jeff Tangney optimistic.

news.summary: In Boston, Skillsoft (NYSE: SKIL) has appointed John Frederick as their new Chief Financial Officer, replacing Rich Walker. Frederick, who previously served as the Chief Transformation Officer, will assume the role immediately. Walker will continue in an advisory capacity until July 4th to ensure a seamless transition. Skillsoft is a platform dedicated to helping organizations and learners reach their full potential.
news.headline: Skillsoft appoints John Frederick as CFO, replacing Rich Walker. Walker to serve until July 4th.

news.summary: Salt Lake City-based ReposiTrak, known for its leading food traceability and compliance network, reported its financial performance for the third fiscal quarter of 2025 which concluded on March 31, 2025. In this quarter, the company saw a 16% rise in total revenue, reaching $5.9 million compared to the previous quarter's $5.1 million. An impressive 98% of the revenue generated during this period was recurring. These positive results reflect the company's effective inventory management and out-of-stock reduction software as a service (SaaS) platform.
news.headline: ReposiTrak reports 16% revenue growth to $5.9 million in Q3 2025 and a 27% rise in net income. EPS stands at $0.10.

news.summary: In New York, Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTWO) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025, which concluded on March 31, 2025. Detailed information can be found in the fourth quarter and fiscal 2025 results presentation available on the Company’s investor relations page at take2games.com/ir. The CEO expressed satisfaction with the performance in the 2025 Fiscal Year, where all business units significantly contributed. Looking ahead to Fiscal 2026, the company anticipates continued success.
news.headline: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTWO) reports Q4 & fiscal year 2025 results, ended March 31, 2025. CEO pleased with 2025 performance.

news.summary: In Atlanta, Volato Group, Inc. (NYSE American: SOAR), a private aviation innovator, reported its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The company achieved profitability from ongoing operations and decreased total liabilities by more than $20 million. Additionally, Volato revealed plans to secure more equity funding and further address outstanding liabilities to extend its operating runway to more than 12 months. The financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2 were positive.
news.headline: Volato Group, Inc. reports Q1 2025 net income, $20 million debt reduction. Plans further settlements and capital raise.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, Rambus Inc. (Nasdaq: RMBS), a company specializing in high-performance chips and intellectual property to enhance data speed and security, disclosed plans for its participation in three forthcoming investor gatherings. The events include the Baird 2025 Global Consumer, Technology & Services Conference; the BofA Securities 2025 Global Technology Conference; and the Rosenblatt 5th Annual Technology Virtual Summit. At the Baird conference, the company’s Chief Financial Officer, Desmond Lynch, will be presenting.
news.headline: Rambus to present at 3 investor conferences: Baird, BofA Securities, Rosenblatt. Executives to discuss at events.
